news.headline: Central bank lowers interest rate to the lowest point in 2.5 years to prevent excess inflow into the currency.
SINEXCEL (300693.SZ) in Shenzhen, China, becomes Tier 1 Low-Voltage Power Quality Supplier per Wintelligence.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on March 20, 2025, SINEXCEL (300693.SZ), a renowned company specializing in power quality, energy storage, and EV charging solutions, has recently been acknowledged by Wintelligence, a prominent industrial research and consulting firm. The recognition designates SINEXCEL as a top-tier provider in Low-Voltage Power Quality solutions.

news.headline: Sunoco LP to issue $750M in senior notes due 2033 in private offering; funds to be used for unspecified purposes.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Sunoco LP (NYSE: SUN) disclosed a private offering of senior notes set to mature in 2033, totaling $750 million. The Partnership plans to utilize the net proceeds from this offering for undisclosed purposes.

news.headline: Veracode has milestone year in 2024 with 300+ new customers, two acquisitions, and industry recognition.
news.summary: Veracode, based in Burlington, Massachusetts, has unveiled their achievements for 2024, including attracting over 300 new customers. They have also successfully completed two strategic acquisitions and gained significant recognition within the industry.

news.headline: New lowest interest rate in the world is in a country in the Alps, not Japan as before.
Power Knot introduces Generation IX upgrades to LFC biodigester in Fremont, California. Improvements aim to enhance efficiency and usability.
news.summary: Power Knot LLC, based in Fremont, California, revealed on March 20, 2025, through a press release, their latest updates to the LFC biodigester, known as generation IX. The company, a top player in on-site organic waste management solutions, unveiled this new version with state-of-the-art features aimed at enhancing efficiency and usability.

news.headline: Just Salad introduces Market Plates, offering premium proteins, grains, and sides for dinner. New Spring Menu. Expanding nationwide.
news.summary: Fast-casual chain Just Salad is focusing on expanding its dinner offerings by introducing a new menu category crafted by their chefs. This category will include premium proteins paired with grains and sides. The restaurant's nationwide expansion efforts are in full swing as they also launch their Seasonal Spring Menu. The company's latest move highlights its strategic push towards attracting more evening customers.

news.headline: FDA clears CELZ-201-DDT trial for back pain. Positive interim data indicates advancement towards Phase 3 study.
news.summary: Encouraging interim blinded data indicates progress towards a potential Phase 3 study. The positive results are paving the way for further advancement, potentially leading to a pivotal Phase 3 trial. This development signifies promising outcomes, underscoring the importance of the findings. The data suggests a robust foundation for moving forward with confidence in the research process. This step could potentially contribute to significant advancements in the field, providing new insights and opportunities for future studies. The optimistic results highlight the potential for a pivotal Phase 3 study, demonstrating the importance of continued research and exploration in this area.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures decline for 2nd day after Fed and Powell statements. Tesla, Nvidia, Boeing see gains.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve Chairman, Powell, reassured investors with positive news, but the stock market did not respond as expected. Companies like Tesla, Nvidia, and Boeing saw increases in their stock values. Dow Jones Futures experienced a decline for the second consecutive day following the Federal Reserve's announcement. Investors are advised to keep an eye out for specific signals in the market.

news.headline: QXO acquires Beacon Roofing Supply for $11 billion in all-cash deal at $124.35 per share, ending takeover battle.
news.summary: Shares of QXO, Inc. (NYSE:QXO) and Beacon Roofing Supply, Inc. (NASDAQ:BECN) are showing premarket gains on Thursday. QXO has announced a definitive merger agreement to acquire Beacon at $124.35 per share in cash. Beacon, a distributor of roofing and exterior products, has close to 600 branches in the U.S. and Canada. The total value of the acquisition is estimated to be around $11 billion. As per the recommendation of Beacon's board, all shareholders are advised to tender their shares into the offer. The all-cash tender offer for Beacon was initiated by QXO on January 27, and the deadline has been extended to 5:00 p.m. today.

The listing is set for March 20, 2025, at 12:05 (UTC) pending adequate liquidity. In commemoration of this launch, MEXC will be...

news.headline: Equifax launches mortgage solution offering credit report + employment status from The Work Number® to speed up mortgage qualification. NYSE: EFX.
news.summary: Equifax has introduced a new feature where the Work Number Report Indicator is included with their credit report, offering faster assessment of consumer creditworthiness and employment status. This innovation aims to expedite the mortgage qualification process in the early stages of lending. This update was announced on March 20, 2025, in Atlanta. Equifax, listed as EFX on NYSE, is behind this initiative.

news.headline: CATL and Ellen MacArthur Foundation partner to develop battery circular economy. CATL becomes a strategic partner.
news.summary: In Ningde, China on March 20, 2025, CATL and the Ellen MacArthur Foundation disclosed a collaboration to expedite the advancement of a circular economy for batteries. CATL will serve as a Strategic Partner, marking it as the initial renewable technology frontrunner in the Foundation's initiatives.

Brand A/S, set to be elected at the company’s upcoming 2025 annual general meeting, has been published on the company’s website. The list includes [number of candidates] candidates.

news.headline: Dream Vacations launches new website, offering chance to win $10,000 vacation getaway. Revolutionizes travel booking experience.
news.summary: Enter now for a chance to win an incredible vacation worth $10,000! Dream Vacations has unveiled a revamped website, changing the way travelers engage with their go-to travel experts. From FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., the contest was launched on March 20, 2025, offering participants the opportunity to win an unforgettable getaway.

news.headline: Mayo Clinic Proton Therapy facility in Jacksonville invests $233 million for durable foundation using Penetron technology.
news.summary: In March 2025, the Mayo Clinic Proton Therapy facility, costing $233 million and located in Jacksonville, Florida, was officially opened. To safeguard the below-grade concrete structures of the hospital from decay caused by elevated conditions, the project called for the use of PENETRON ADMIX SB, a crystalline concrete waterproofing admixture.

news.headline: Swedencare launches ProDen PlaqueOff® Crunchy Dental Bites in Malmö, Sweden on March 20, 2025 to tackle pet dental issues.
news.summary: In Malmö, Sweden, on March 20, 2025, a new easy and tasty solution has been introduced to combat plaque, tartar, and bad breath in pets. Swedencare has launched the innovative ProDen PlaqueOff® Crunchy Dental Bites, a natural dental chew aimed at reducing these common issues. This product provides a convenient way to promote oral health in pets effectively.

news.headline: Indian-American composer Reena Esmail introduces Western choirs to Hindi music with 'Sunao', 3 songs featuring Hindi lyrics.
news.summary: Renowned Indian-American composer Reena Esmail recently introduced a collection of three songs titled 'Sunao,' aimed at familiarizing young Western choirs with Hindi language and Hindustani raag. The Hindi lyrics for the songs were crafted by Reena Bhansali, better known as Hindi By Reena. The launch took place in Los Angeles on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: PEJU Winery joins Share & Pair Sundays to highlight wine & food starting March 23, 2025. Featuring Karen MacNeil, Janet Fletcher, Winemaker Sara Fowler, and curated pairings.
news.summary: PEJU Winery is set to participate in the first-ever Share & Pair Sundays, a 10-week event that will bring together wine and food enthusiasts. The lineup features renowned figures such as Karen MacNeil, Janet Fletcher, and Winemaker Sara Fowler, who will offer their expertise alongside specially curated pairings. The series commences on March 23 at the PEJU Winery in Rutherford, California. The event is expected to draw significant attention from wine and culinary aficionados.

news.headline: USSSA and Rawlings extend partnership through 2028, benefiting youth teams and fans. VIERA, Fla., March 20, 2025.
news.summary: An agreement has been reached extending through 2028, enhancing mutual advantages for both brands, as well as for youth fastpitch and baseball teams and fans nationwide. This partnership involves the United States Specialty Sports Association (USSSA), a prominent multi-sport organization. The agreement was finalized in VIERA, Fla., announced on March 20, 2025. This collaboration aims to benefit a wide range of stakeholders within the sports community.

news.headline: Empire Freezing & Drying gets exclusive rights to Sunkist® freeze-dried products for retail across US.
news.summary: Empire Freezing & Drying has acquired exclusive licensing for Sunkist® freeze-dried products. This deal will introduce high-quality freeze-dried fruit slices and fruit purees with a chocolate coating under the Sunkist brand to numerous retail outlets across the United States. This agreement will see these products available in thousands of stores nationwide, offering consumers a taste of premium, domestically grown Sunkist freeze-dried treats.

news.headline: PredictAP receives U.S. patent for AI-powered invoice coding, enhancing efficiency in real estate AP.
news.summary: A Boston-based company, PredictAP, specializing in AI-powered invoice coding for real estate accounts payable, has recently been granted a U.S. patent for its unique approach. The technology is geared towards streamlining invoice processing and has been recognized for its innovative methods. This patent serves as a validation of PredictAP's AI-driven solution, showcasing its effectiveness in improving efficiency and accuracy in AP operations. The company's dedication to enhancing invoice processing is evident, with this recognition highlighting the impact of their work in the industry.

news.headline: Gatewise named 2025 NAA Top Employers Award winner, highlighting commitment to workplace excellence.
news.summary: Gatewise, a prominent provider of smart access control solutions for the multifamily sector, has recently been awarded for its dedication to fostering a positive workplace culture and high associate satisfaction levels. This recognition emphasizes the company's commitment to excellence in the workplace. The announcement was made on March 20, 2025 in Houston.

news.headline: Report on USA Platinum-Group Metals Market: 2019-2024 review and forecasts to 2029. Covers supply, demand, prices, and downstream industries. From ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A report titled "Platinum-Group Metals Market in the USA: 2019-2024 Review and Forecast to 2029" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. This report serves as a crucial reference for individuals seeking detailed insights into the Platinum-Group Metals market in the USA. It encompasses an analysis of the market from 2019 to 2024 and offers forecasts for the period of 2025 to 2029 related to supply, demand, prices, and downstream industries. The comprehensive report presents a thorough examination of the Platinum-Group Metals (PGM) market landscape.

news.headline: Chairman Jørgen Hesselbjerg Mikkelsen of Alm. Brand A/S not seeking re-election, Jais Valeur nominated as new chairman.
news.summary: Jørgen Hesselbjerg Mikkelsen, the current Chairman of the Board of Directors of Alm. Brand A/S, has decided not to seek re-election at the upcoming general meeting. The Board of Directors has put forward Jais Valeur as the nominee for the new chairman position.

news.headline: XPLR Infrastructure, LP offers $1.4 billion senior unsecured notes due in 2031 in a private offering.
news.summary: A company based in Juno Beach, Florida, XPLR Infrastructure, LP (NYSE: XIFR), revealed on March 20, 2025, about a private offering of senior unsecured notes totaling $1,400 million. This offering includes senior unsecured notes with maturity dates in 2031.

Duke Robotics showcases profitable 2024 financial results, establishes Greek subsidiary, eyes the civilian utility maintenance market.
news.summary: Duke Robotics has smoothly shifted from the development phase to commercialization, showcasing its progress with a service deal with the Israel Electric Corporation. Alongside, the company has strategically expanded into Europe by launching a Greek subsidiary. This move comes as Duke Robotics sets its sights on the rapidly expanding civilian utility maintenance sector. Their cutting-edge drone technologies are at the forefront of this initiative, indicating a promising future for the company. This transition and expansion signify a significant step in Duke Robotics' journey, marking a pivotal moment in their growth.

news.headline: Coreweave announces IPO launch for Class A common stock with registration filing on Form S-1.
news.summary: Livingston, New Jersey - On March 20, 2025, CoreWeave, Inc. (referred to as "CoreWeave"), a prominent AI Hyperscaler™, revealed the initiation of the roadshow for its anticipated initial public offering for its Class A common stock. The company has officially submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 with the relevant authorities.

news.headline: InflaRx had a productive year in 2024, with achievements like €55.2M cash, European approval for GOHIBIC, Phase 3 milestone, and Phase 2a trials with promising data expected in critical medical areas. Subsequently, raised €28.7M. Positive outcomes projected for financial and operational goals into 2027.
news.summary: InflaRx N.V. achieved European Commission approval for GOHIBIC® (vilobelimab) for treating SARS-CoV-2-induced ARDS. They reached a 30-patient milestone in the Phase 3 vilobelimab trial for pyoderma gangrenosum (PG) and dosed the first patient in a Phase 2a trial for the oral C5aR inhibitor, INF904. They had €55.2 million in funds as of December 31, 2024, with an additional €28.7 million raised in February 2025. This extended their cash runway to fund operations into 2027. Select highlights for 2025 include expected topline data for INF904 in CSU and HS in summer 2025 and an interim analysis for the vilobelimab Phase 3 trial for PG by May 2025. Their net loss in 2024 was €46.1 million, with significant expenses in sales, R&D, and administrative costs. They also detailed financial statements for the years ending in 2022, 2023, and 2024.

news.headline: IVQ announced Q4 2024 results featuring US$65.4M asset sale, US$27.3M debenture exchange, and $0.00 FFO. Balance sheet shows total assets at $637.22K and 28 properties. CEO emphasizes focus on asset sales for shareholder value.
news.summary: Invesque Inc. reported results for Q4 and full-year 2024 with revenue at $38.7 million for Q4 and $167.9 million for the year. The company sold seven seniors housing assets for $65.4 million and completed a debenture exchange of $27.3 million. They reported a net loss of $6.6 million for Q4 and $36.1 million for the year. Funds from operations were $0.00 for Q4 and $0.08 per share for the year. Adjusted funds from operations were $0.02 for Q4 and $0.09 per share for the year. The company reduced its KeyBank credit facility balance to under $35 million and extended the maturity to Sep 30, 2025. They plan to strategically sell assets to optimize shareholder value. Total assets as of Dec 31, 2024 were $637.2 million with 28 properties.

news.headline: Bloomberg suggests addressing 'migrants' as 'immigrants' in latest report, highlighting importance of accurate terminology.
PINATA teams with Allied Beverage Group for National Accounts Command Center, offering real-time tracking for alcohol industry.
news.summary: PINATA has recently unveiled the National Accounts Command Center in New York, a cutting-edge platform designed to facilitate real-time monitoring of execution and compliance for suppliers and distributors. The Command Center will provide crucial insights and data for stakeholders, ensuring seamless operations and adherence to standards.

news.headline: MetaVia announces positive results in December for DA-1241 trial. Top-line data for DA-1726 expected in April 2025.
news.summary: Positive top-line results from the Phase 2a trial of DA-1241 for MASH treatment were announced in December. These results showed direct hepatic action alongside its glucose-lowering effect. The Phase 1 trial of DA-1726 is progressing, with top-line data from MAD Part 2 expected in April 2025. $16 was the significant figure associated with this announcement.

news.headline: Rebel Athletic receives minority investment from Main Post Partners, a private equity firm specializing in high-growth brands.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Rebel Athletic, a prominent provider of couture Allstar and cheerleading attire, disclosed a significant development of securing a strategic minority investment from Main Post Partners. Main Post Partners, distinguished for their focus on founder-led high-growth challenger brands, has aided Rebel Athletic with this deal. This move marks a crucial step for Rebel Athletic in expanding its market presence and achieving robust growth.

news.headline: Global IV equipment market to reach US$ 35,270M by 2035, growing at 5.9% CAGR. Key players include Braun Melsungen AG and BD. North America projected to hold 35.4% market share in 2035. IV Catheters to grow at 5.7% CAGR, creating US$ 4,737M opportunity.
news.summary: The global intravenous (IV) equipment market is expected to reach a valuation of US$19,881 million in 2025, with a projected growth rate of 5.9% from 2025 to 2035. Factors such as technological advancements, increasing chronic diseases, and an aging population are driving this growth. The market is witnessing a rise in demand for IV equipment such as catheters, infusion pumps, and securement devices due to the need for safe and efficient fluid delivery in healthcare settings. Cardiovascular diseases are a leading cause of death, emphasizing the importance of effective IV treatments. The market is also benefiting from innovations like smart pumps and AI-based IV administration systems, which enhance precision and patient safety. The home healthcare industry is expanding, leading to a growing demand for portable IV equipment. Key market players include Braun Melsungen AG and BD. North America is expected to hold a significant market share of 35.4% in 2035. IV catheters are anticipated to experience a 5.7% growth rate, leading to a US$4,737 million opportunity between 2025 and 2035. The overall market is projected to reach US$35,270 million by 2035, with a US$3,676 million opportunity between 2019 and 2024. Substantial investments in healthcare infrastructure by countries like the United States, China, and India are expanding patient access to IV therapy.

news.headline: Antitrust expert Dr. Matthew Backus joins Compass Lexecon, affiliated with FTI Consulting; announcement made on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, FTI Consulting, Inc. disclosed that Dr. Matthew Backus has joined their Compass Lexecon subsidiary. FTI Consulting, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FCN.

(Nasdaq: IFRX), a leading biopharmaceutical firm specializing in anti-inflammatory treatments that target the complement system, disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. news.headline: Nayax unveils new state-of-charge feature for EV kiosks, enhancing EV charging with cutting-edge tech.
news.summary: A recent report stated that the global population has reached approximately 7.8 billion people, with over 3.5 billion being active social media users. The report also highlighted that there are over 1.5 billion websites online, and the number of internet users has surpassed 4.5 billion worldwide. Additionally, the data revealed that around 1.2 billion students worldwide have been affected by school closures due to the COVID-19 pandemic. These statistics emphasize the significant impact of technology and global events on various aspects of human life.

news.headline: Cytokinetics introduces EARTH-HCM, tool for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy community with real-world data for care access.
news.summary: A new interactive tool has been developed leveraging real-world data to showcase the burden of disease in Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy (HCM) and promote equal access to care. This tool aims to provide a visual representation of the prevalence and impact of HCM by utilizing crucial data sets. By employing this tool, stakeholders can gain valuable insights into the disease, helping to enhance understanding and pave the way for more equitable distribution of healthcare resources.

news.headline: 3E Network Tech invests in HashBeaver to boost blockchain innovation with cloud mining. Combined B2B expertise for growth.
news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between a company specializing in B2B IT services and HashBeaver, a leading provider of cloud mining solutions. This partnership aims to leverage the company’s expertise in B2B IT services with HashBeaver’s innovative cloud mining technology to drive growth across various industries.

news.headline: Company's 2024 fourth quarter and year-end results are announced by Knight Therapeutics.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was detailed that the unemployment rate in the country has skyrocketed to 10%, which is an increase of 3% from the previous quarter. The number of job losses has also surged to over 2 million, significantly impacting the economy. Additionally, the inflation rate has risen to 5%, marking a 2% jump compared to last year. These figures highlight the harsh realities faced by both businesses and individuals in the current financial climate.Experts predict that the situation may worsen before showing any signs of improvement.

news.headline: Quantum BioPharma invests $1.5M in Bitcoin, other cryptocurrencies, bringing total investment to $3.5M, aiming to grow crypto assets.
news.summary: Toronto, March 20, 2025 - Quantum BioPharma Ltd. has recently disclosed its decision to expand its holdings in cryptocurrency, with an additional USD $1,500,000 invested in Bitcoin (BTC) and other digital assets. This move, approved by the Board of Directors, brings the total investment in cryptocurrencies to USD $3,500,000. The company aims to bolster its crypto assets as part of its strategic objectives. Quantum BioPharma will persist in accommodating future financial activities and transactions using cryptocurrency, in alignment with its long-term plans.
